source_milestone: R16 Operational Memory, Artifact Map, and Role-Bound Workflow Foundation

allowed_proof_treatments.rule: Canonical authority may constrain behavior but is not proof by itself unless backed by committed machine evidence.
Generated or planning reports are operator artifacts unless backed by committed evidence.
Validation manifests are proof evidence only for the commands they record.
State artifacts are committed machine evidence only if validator-backed.
Committed machine evidence requires exact source refs and validator-backed identity.
The memory-layer contract is model/contract proof only, not runtime memory.
Deprecated context may be retained for cleanup only and cannot override active authority.

forbidden_memory_content: implementation proof claim from planning report

freshness.freshness_basis: exact committed path refs checked during R16-004 contract validation

role_eligibility.role_scope_note: Eligibility is documentation/model scope only, not agent execution.

forbidden_content: implementation proof claim without validator-backed evidence
non_claims: not a generated operational memory layer
no context budget estimator implemented yet
memory-layer contract existence does not equal memory runtime

invalid_state_rules.description: Fail closed when missing layer type rejected.
Fail closed when unknown layer type rejected.
Fail closed when missing authority class rejected.
Fail closed when unknown authority class rejected.
Fail closed when missing source refs rejected.
Fail closed when broad repo root source ref rejected.
Fail closed when wildcard source ref rejected.
Fail closed when generated report as machine proof rejected.
Fail closed when planning report as implementation proof rejected.
Fail closed when stale ref without caveat rejected.
Fail closed when runtime memory loading claim rejected.
Fail closed when persistent memory runtime claim rejected.
Fail closed when retrieval runtime claim rejected.
Fail closed when vector search runtime claim rejected.
Fail closed when product runtime claim rejected.
Fail closed when actual autonomous agents claim rejected.
Fail closed when true multi agent execution claim rejected.
Fail closed when external integration claim rejected.
Fail closed when r16 005 or later implementation claim rejected.
Fail closed when r16 027 or later task rejected.
Fail closed when r13 closure claim rejected.
Fail closed when r14 caveat removal rejected.
Fail closed when r15 caveat removal rejected.
